These readings were taken on a time-tigger file on the sonde because the surveyor was malfunctioning, but worked for long enough after additional charging efforts to establish a multi-hour long time-trigger file on the sonde that we used to collect these data points. Also I (SF) programed the wrong conductivity measurement so no usable readings were recorded. I used mS/cm instead of µS/cm by mistake so the sonde rounded down the values to 0, which does at least indicate the values were very low, below 50 µS/cm.
